title: PURPLE LADYBUG Decorate Your Own Jewellery Box for Girls - Arts and Crafts for Kids Age 10 - Mosaic Kits for Children Ages 4+ - Birthday Presents for Girls - Girls Jewellery Box for Girls Ages 4-12
features: Complete DIY Jewellery Box Kit: Includes premium wooden box with clasp, 1500+ gems, non-toxic glue, applicator stick, and gloves for a fun, mess-free experience girls will love decorating.
Creativity & Confidence Builder : Kids can design their own girls jewellery box, boosting fine motor skills, creativity, and focus while making a keepsake they’ll proudly use and display.
Safe & Easy to Use: Features water-based non-toxic glue, applicator stick, and latex finger gloves. Simple instructions make it easy for girls to decorate on their own or with friends.
Ideals for Girls Ages 4-12: Perfect for birthdays, holidays, girls Christmas gifts, or rainy day crafts. Great for gifts for 6 year old girls, 8 year old girls, 10 year old girls, and more.

Incredible girls gifts: Comes in beautiful ready-to-gift packaging, perfect as birthday gifts for girls, Easter gifts for kids, Christmas gifts for girls, stocking fillers, Valentine's, or end-of-year surprises.
Tested for Safety: We test all Purple Ladybug products for safety in an independent laboratory to ensure they all meet toy safety standards. Your satisfaction matters to us!
